title: MrCrabTAB's PVP Animations
description: Enhances PVP gameplay with smoother, faster combat animations.
body:
MrCrabTAB's PVP Animations is a client-side mod that optimizes combat animations for PVP by making swing animations quicker and reducing their visual movement, resulting cleaner visibility during fights. The mod also removes swing animations when placing blocks.

**I HIGHLY recommend pairing this mod with the "No Item Swap Animation" for the best experience.**



![Paired with No Item Swap Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cadff3253cc033dacb4f3da81334caa86b2381c.gif)

(paired with "No Item Swap Animation")




![How I use it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91b3ed47eb5eeecb946ab1b6c9bf45d182b6f8f5.gif)

(How I use it)
